title: Feed-health / pipeline status
description: Per-feed health, written by scripts/pipeline_status.py with loud assertions. The silent-scraper-404 lesson: every feed asserts row-count and staleness and fails loudly instead of masking a 0-row write.

generated_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp this status was written.

feeds.description: Map of feed name -> its health record.

rows.description: Row count of the last write; 0 must never be silently ok.

last_success_utc.description: Timestamp of last successful non-empty write, or null if never.
